privileged_info_summary: The food.gdt dataset is a real, non-synthetic dataset from Chapter 2 of Hill, Griffiths, and Lim's Principles of Econometrics, 5th Edition (2018), containing household survey data for 40 households. The dataset includes two variables: food_exp (weekly food expenditure in dollars, range $109.71-$587.66) and income (weekly income in $100 units, range 3.69-33.4). The task correctly specifies that Gretl's Add > Logs of selected variables menu will create a new variable named l_food_exp (using the standard l_ prefix convention) containing the natural logarithm transformation of food_exp. The expected output file path /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/food_with_log.gdt follows the configured Gretl output directory structure.
